brightsmith_specReference.versionNote: v1.4 spec is delta-only over v1.3 (snapshot 2955168649587464831). The bronze delta is one new column: endowment_value_flag (string, nullable, field id 13) sourced from F1A's XF1H02 and F2's XF2H02; F3 is structurally NULL (no F3H family). The v1.3 column lineage for the 12 baseline fields is unchanged and preserved verbatim from full-pipeline-ipeds-finance-20260501T203128Z.json — only the new field's column lineage is added here, plus the new RAW-IPF-015 enum gate. Within v1.4, the spec was internally amended v1.0 → v1.1 → v1.2 → v1.3 (chaos-monkey R1 extension to the consumable filter); the bronze ingest is unchanged across those internal amendments — the bronze snapshot 8612278722865929234 services all four internal versions.

brightsmith_agentAttribution.reasoning: Bronze re-ingest of IPEDS Finance for FY2023 to land the v1.4 endowment_value_flag column at field id 13. The IpedsFinanceIngestor performs the same 5-input fan-in as v1.3 — F2223_F1A.zip (GASB public), F2223_F2.zip (FASB nonprofit), F2223_F3.zip (for-profit), EFIA2023.zip (FTE source), HD2023.zip (Header file for institution_name + ICLEVEL=1 AND HLOFFER>=5 4-year-bachelor's-or-above filter) — but with two new column-extraction codes wired into _flatten_one(): XF1H02 on F1A and XF2H02 on F2, coalesced into a single canonical endowment_value_flag string column. F3 rows pass an explicit None to the flag parameter (structural NULL — for-profits have no F3H family in the IPEDS Finance schema, locked v1.3). Sentinel handling for the flag column is intentionally restricted to the suppression set ('', '.', 'PrivacySuppressed' → NULL) and does NOT scrub numeric -1/-2 — those are pass-through-verbatim so RAW-IPF-015's enum gate fires loudly on any anomalous code rather than silently dropping the value. The four canonical raw monetary fields (institutional_support_expenses, instruction_expenses, endowment_value) and total_fte_enrollment are produced by the unchanged v1.3 logic; only the flag is additive.
brightsmith_agentAttribution.reasoningContinued: Output: 2,675 rows / 13 columns / snapshot 8612278722865929234 — row count is unchanged from v1.3 baseline 2955168649587464831 (the v1.4 change is additive, not row-changing). Form mix (F1A=819, F2=1579, F3=277) is unchanged. Flag distribution measured at landing: F1A R=737/A=80/N=1/P=1; F2 R=1293/A=285/P=1; F3 NULL=277. Flag prevalence-`A` rate per form: F1A 9.77% (80/819), F2 18.05% (285/1579) — both are inside the v1.2-recalibrated BSE-IPF-019 per-form bands (F1A 5-15%, F2 12-25%). The 14 v1.3 DQ rules (RAW-IPF-001..014) all PASS unchanged on the new snapshot. The new RAW-IPF-015 enum-check (flag ∈ {R, A, P, Z, N} OR NULL) PASSES with 0 violations — observed codes are a strict subset of the 5-code allowed set ({R, A, P, N} on F1A; {R, A, P} on F2; no Z observed in FY2023). Pre-flight value-domain confirmation per spec §4 EDA Req #1 published in governance/eda/ipeds-finance-v1.4-flag-eda.md.

rowsRead.EFIA2023: ~6,036 (one row per UNITID, no dedup needed)

documentation.description: Land the IPEDS Finance survey for FY2023 into Iceberg table bronze.ipeds_finance with the v1.4 schema (13 fields). Five-input fan-in identical to v1.3: three form-specific finance CSVs (F1A/F2/F3), EFIA for FTE, HD2023 for institution_name + the 4-year bachelor's-or-above filter (ICLEVEL=1 AND HLOFFER>=5). The v1.4 delta is a single new column: endowment_value_flag, the IPEDS imputation flag for endowment_value, sourced verbatim from the per-form X-prefixed flag columns (XF1H02 on F1A; XF2H02 on F2; structural NULL on F3 because the IPEDS Finance schema has no F3H family for for-profits). The flag column uses a different sentinel-scrub policy than the monetary columns: only the suppression-sentinel set ('', '.', 'PrivacySuppressed') is mapped to NULL — numeric sentinels (-1/-2) pass through verbatim so RAW-IPF-015 fires loudly on anomalies rather than silently dropping the value. All v1.3 column lineage (12 fields) is preserved unchanged.

May contain suppression sentinels ('', '.', 'PrivacySuppressed') which are mapped to NULL; numeric sentinels (-1/-2) are passed through verbatim for RAW-IPF-015 to flag.

fields.name: endowment_value_flag
fields.description: v1.4 NEW — Iceberg field id 13. IPEDS imputation flag for endowment_value, sourced verbatim from XF1H02 (F1A) / XF2H02 (F2) / structural NULL (F3). Observed FY2023 domain: {R, A, P, N} on F1A; {R, A, P} on F2; NULL on F3. RAW-IPF-015 (P0) enforces the {R, A, P, Z, N} OR NULL allowed set.

endowment_value_flag.transformationDescription: v1.4 NEW column. Per-form COALESCE: F1A rows take XF1H02 (F1A Part H imputation flag for endowment assets); F2 rows take XF2H02 (F2 Section H imputation flag); F3 rows take explicit None (structural NULL — F3 has no XF3H family because for-profits do not maintain endowments). Single-stage transform per row: pass through IpedsFinanceIngestor._strip_flag_sentinel() — mapping the suppression-sentinel set {'', '.', 'PrivacySuppressed'} (and whitespace-only strings) to NULL while preserving numeric sentinels (-1/-2) verbatim and preserving the alphabetic codes {R, A, P, Z, N} verbatim with no case normalization. Crucially this is NOT the same _coerce_double sentinel pipeline used for the monetary columns: numeric -1/-2 are explicitly NOT scrubbed at raw so RAW-IPF-015 fires loudly on anomalous codes rather than the value being silently dropped. The flag is never numeric-coerced — it remains a string. Bureau-imputed values (the underlying X-prefixed columns are themselves the imputation flags — they are not flagged-on-flag). RAW-IPF-015 (P0) enforces flag ∈ {R, A, P, Z, N} OR NULL.

The full column-lineage definitions are documented in governance/lineage/full-pipeline-ipeds-finance-20260501T203128Z.json — referenced by inclusion to avoid duplication. brightsmith_specReference.versionNote: v1.4 base zone delta is one passthrough column: endowment_value_flag (string, nullable, field id 16), copied verbatim from bronze.ipeds_finance.endowment_value_flag with no derivation, no rename, and no case-normalization. Schema goes 15 → 16 fields. The base table was DROP-AND-RECREATED rather than ALTER-TABLE'd because the framework's append-only promote pattern has no schema-evolution hook; v1.3 base snapshots are invalidated by the recreate. The drop+recreate is documented in spec §9 Build Accountability Log line 1534-1536.

brightsmith_agentAttribution.reasoning: Base re-promote of base.ipeds_finance from bronze snapshot 8612278722865929234 to land the v1.4 endowment_value_flag passthrough at field id 16. The transformer at src/silver/ipeds_finance_base.py adds a single line to transform_row(): copy bronze.endowment_value_flag verbatim into base.endowment_value_flag, type-coerced to (str | None). No derivation, no rename, no normalization — pure passthrough fidelity per spec §5 Decision (no §2 decision; §5 is direct). The 15 v1.3 base fields are produced by the unchanged v1.3 logic (per-FTE derivations: instruction_per_fte, institutional_support_per_fte, endowment_per_fte; marketing_ratio derivation; data_completeness_tier synthesis; provenance columns: bronze_record_id, source_load_date, promoted_at; raw passthroughs of the four monetary fields and total_fte_enrollment from bronze). Only the new flag column is additive at base.
brightsmith_agentAttribution.reasoningContinued: Output: 2,675 rows / 16 columns / snapshot 5533921477059200416 — row count matches bronze (BSE-IPF-001 conservation passes; 2,675 == 2,675). Form mix unchanged (F1A=819, F2=1579, F3=277). Flag distribution at base mirrors bronze exactly per the BSE-IPF-018 passthrough fidelity preview (0 mismatches across all 2,675 UNITIDs). The new BSE-IPF-020 A↔NULL coupling invariant PASSES on FY2023: 80/80 F1A A-flagged rows have endowment_value NULL; 285/285 F2 A-flagged rows have endowment_value NULL; 0 F1A/F2 NULL-value rows lack the A flag (F3 rows are exempt by structure). The new BSE-IPF-019 per-form A-prevalence rate is INSIDE both bands (F1A 9.77% ∈ [5,15]; F2 18.05% ∈ [12,25]) — but DEVIATION-V14-RAW-001 is logged in the spec because these rates are below the original v1.3 single-band 20-40% (which was mis-calibrated against pre-HD-filter source-CSV measurements; v1.2 recalibrated to per-form bands against the landed-bronze post-HD-filter surface). All 17 v1.3 base DQ rules (BSE-IPF-001..017) PASS unchanged. The non-fatal pyiceberg lineage emit error 'Table object has no attribute identifier' from brightsmith.infra.promote.py line 71 fired during the re-promote — flagged in spec §9 line 1537 as pre-existing framework issue, not caused by this spec. Promote itself succeeded.

documentation.description: Promote bronze.ipeds_finance to base.ipeds_finance with the v1.4 schema (16 fields). The v1.4 delta is a single passthrough column: endowment_value_flag, copied verbatim from bronze with no derivation, no rename, and no case-normalization. The 15 v1.3 base fields are produced by the unchanged v1.3 logic (per-FTE derivations, marketing_ratio, data_completeness_tier, provenance columns, raw passthroughs). The base table was DROP-AND-RECREATED rather than ALTER-TABLE'd because the framework's append-only promote pattern has no schema-evolution hook for additive columns at field-id 16; on first run with the new schema, the existing v1.3 table at 15 fields cannot back-fill, so all rows dedup'd by record_id and 0 promoted. The fix (idempotent drop+recreate) is documented in spec §9 line 1534-1536. Three new DQ rules land at base: BSE-IPF-018 (passthrough fidelity), BSE-IPF-019 (per-form A-prevalence band), BSE-IPF-020 (A↔NULL coupling invariant).

Same NULL semantics as bronze (NULL on F3 structural; {R, A, P, Z, N} on F1A/F2). BSE-IPF-018 (P0) enforces 0 mismatches against bronze; BSE-IPF-019 (P1) enforces per-form A-prevalence band; BSE-IPF-020 (P0) enforces A↔NULL coupling on endowment_value.

endowment_value_flag.transformationDescription: v1.4 NEW column. Pure verbatim passthrough from bronze.ipeds_finance.endowment_value_flag — no derivation, no rename, no case-normalization, no value mutation. transform_row() casts the bronze value to (str | None) and writes it to the same-named base field at field id 16. The NULL semantics propagate exactly: NULL on F3 (structural — bronze had structural NULL because F3 has no XF3H family); {R, A, P, Z, N} on F1A/F2 (the strict subset of the IPEDS dictionary's 13-code shared lookup observed in FY2023 endowment data). BSE-IPF-018 (P0) enforces zero passthrough-fidelity mismatches against bronze (every UNITID's flag at base must equal the bronze value joined on UNITID). BSE-IPF-019 (P1) enforces per-form A-prevalence inside the recalibrated v1.2 bands (F1A 5-15%, F2 12-25%) — landed at F1A 9.77% / F2 18.05%, both inside band. BSE-IPF-020 (P0) enforces the A↔NULL coupling invariant: every flag='A' row has endowment_value IS NULL, AND every F1A/F2 endowment_value IS NULL row has flag='A' (F3 exempt by structure). FY2023 verification: 0 violations on either direction.

Their column lineage was already canonical at v1.3 land — see governance/models/base-ipeds-finance-{conceptual,logical,physical}.md (delta-patched per spec §8) and the v1.3 lineage emit (which was lost when the v1.3 table was dropped during the v1.4 schema-evolution recreate). brightsmith_specReference.versionNote: v1.4 consumable zone delta is two schema additions plus one row-count-changing filter. Schema goes 15 → 17 fields: +endowment_value_provenance (string, nullable, field id 16) — RENAMED passthrough from base.endowment_value_flag per §2 Decision A; +source_load_date (date, NOT NULL, field id 17) — RESTORED passthrough from base.source_load_date per §2 Decision G. The filter is the §6 8-pattern AND 4-clause-numeric-proxy system-administrative-office filter, applied BEFORE the promote write so excluded rows never reach consumable. The filter SQL was internally amended v1.0 → v1.3 within this spec (chaos-monkey R1) — the v1.3-final form has 4 numeric-proxy disjuncts (instruction_expenses NULL OR < $1M OR total_fte_enrollment NULL OR < 50). The consumable table was DROP-AND-RECREATED twice: first for the schema 15 → 17 evolution at v1.0 (snapshot 8225412535835512350, 2,651 rows / 24 excluded); then again at v1.3 to apply the 4-clause filter (snapshot 950547093607535235, 2,630 rows / 45 excluded). The v1.3-final snapshot is the surface that ships.

brightsmith_agentAttribution.reasoning: Consumable re-promote of consumable.ipeds_finance_profile from base snapshot 5533921477059200416 to land three v1.4 changes: (1) endowment_value_provenance rename passthrough from base.endowment_value_flag at field id 16, (2) source_load_date restored passthrough from base.source_load_date at field id 17, (3) system-administrative-office filter applied before promote write. The transformer at src/gold/ipeds_finance_profile.py adds two new helpers: _name_matches_system_office_pattern() (a pure-Python translation of the 8 LOWER(institution_name) LIKE patterns from §6 SQL) and is_system_office_row() (combines the name pattern match AND the 4-clause numeric proxy: instruction_expenses IS NULL OR < $1M OR total_fte_enrollment IS NULL OR < 50). transform_rows() applies is_system_office_row() as a row-filter BEFORE the per-row transform, so excluded rows never enter the per-row transform and never reach Iceberg. transform_row() emits endowment_value_provenance from base.endowment_value_flag (rename) and source_load_date from base.source_load_date (restore). The 13 v1.3 consumable fields are produced by the unchanged v1.3 logic.
brightsmith_agentAttribution.reasoningContinued: Output: 2,630 rows / 17 columns / snapshot 950547093607535235 — 45 rows excluded by the §6 v1.3-final filter (24 carried over from v1.0-v1.2 2-clause proxy + 21 additional admin entities caught by the v1.3 FTE-NULL/<50 disjunct). Drop pattern: every excluded UNITID matches one of the 8 admin-name patterns AND has either NULL/sub-$1M instruction OR NULL/sub-50 FTE. Live test target UNITID 242060 (Sistema Universitario Ana G. Mendez) is excluded by the 8th '%sistema universitario%' pattern (matched name) AND instruction_expenses=$2,565 < $1M (matched first numeric disjunct). False-positive shield holds: Stanford ($2.68B instr / 19,094 FTE), Harvard ($1.46B / 31,201), MIT ($1.09B / 11,703), Berea ($473M / 59,317) all SURVIVE because their names do not match any pattern. UNITID 195827 (SUNY-System Office, $2.21M instr / FTE NULL) was PRESERVED under v1.0-v1.2 (2-clause proxy: instr > $1M) but is now EXCLUDED under v1.3 (FTE NULL disjunct). Tier distribution: high=1981, medium=649. CON-IFP-001a (P0 upper, 2,630 <= 2,675) PASS. CON-IFP-001b (P1 lower, 2,630 >= 2,625 = base − 50) PASS with 5-row margin. CON-IFP-013 (provenance passthrough fidelity) 0 mismatches. CON-IFP-014 (filter execution: 0 surviving rows match exclusion predicate) PASS. CON-IFP-015 (source_load_date 100% non-null) PASS. The non-fatal pyiceberg lineage emit error 'Table object has no attribute identifier' fired again — pre-existing framework issue per spec §9 line 1537 / line 1608.

documentation.description: Promote base.ipeds_finance to consumable.ipeds_finance_profile with the v1.4 schema (17 fields) and the v1.3-final system-administrative-office filter. Three v1.4 deltas: (1) endowment_value_provenance rename passthrough from base.endowment_value_flag at field id 16 — semantic rename only, no value mutation; (2) source_load_date restored passthrough from base at field id 17 NOT NULL; (3) system-office filter applied before promote write per §6 SQL. The 13 v1.3 consumable fields (record_id, unitid, institution_name, report_form, fiscal_year, total_fte_enrollment, the three raw-dollar passthroughs, the three per-FTE values, marketing_ratio, data_completeness_tier, promoted_at) are produced by the unchanged v1.3 logic. Seven new DQ rules land at consumable: CON-IFP-001a + CON-IFP-001b (split of v1.3's strict-equality CON-IFP-001 per §2 Decision E to absorb filter cycle drift); CON-IFP-012 (fiscal_year invariant at consumable surface); CON-IFP-013 (provenance passthrough fidelity); CON-IFP-014 (filter executed: 0 surviving rows match exclusion predicate); CON-IFP-015 (source_load_date 100% non-null); CON-IFP-016 (source_load_date within 400 days of promoted_at). The consumable table was DROP-AND-RECREATED twice: first for the schema 15 → 17 evolution at v1.0 (snapshot 8225412535835512350, 2,651 rows); then again at v1.3 to apply the 4-clause filter (snapshot 950547093607535235, 2,630 rows). The v1.3-final snapshot is the surface that ships.

transformation.filterDescription: System-administrative-office filter applied at transform_rows() BEFORE the per-row transform. A row is excluded if and only if BOTH clauses match: (a) institution_name matches one of 8 LOWER-LIKE patterns AND (b) the row matches at least one of 4 organizational-shell numeric signals. The 4-clause numeric proxy is the v1.3 chaos-monkey R1 amendment over the v1.0-v1.2 2-clause proxy — adding the FTE-NULL/<50 disjuncts caught 21 additional admin entities (e.g., LA CCD Office UNITID 117681, SUNY-System Office UNITID 195827, UMass-Central Office UNITID 166665) whose instruction_expenses sat above the $1M floor but FTE was NULL. The §2 Decision B AND-clause is the deliberate guardrail against false-positives: a real teaching school whose legal name happens to match a pattern (e.g., a hypothetical Berea-style school named '... Office') is preserved if it has positive FTE and instruction >= $1M.
transformation.filterSql: WHERE NOT ((LOWER(institution_name) LIKE '% office' OR LOWER(institution_name) LIKE '% system' OR LOWER(institution_name) LIKE '% system %' OR LOWER(institution_name) LIKE '%chancellor%' OR LOWER(institution_name) LIKE '%central office%' OR LOWER(institution_name) LIKE '%system office%' OR LOWER(institution_name) LIKE '%district office%' OR LOWER(institution_name) LIKE '%sistema universitario%') AND (instruction_expenses IS NULL OR instruction_expenses < 1000000.0 OR total_fte_enrollment IS NULL OR total_fte_enrollment < 50))
transformation.filterNumericProxyVersion: v1.3 (chaos-monkey R1 — added FTE-NULL/<50 disjuncts on top of v1.0-v1.2 2-clause proxy)

transformation.rowsExcludedSampleNote: 33 of 45 excluded UNITIDs enumerated above (24 v1.0-v1.2 carry-overs + 9 of the 21 v1.3 FTE-NULL extensions). The remaining 12 v1.3-newly-excluded UNITIDs (e.g., CSU-Chancellor's Office UNITID 110501, UC-System Administration UNITID 124557, CUNY System Office UNITID 190035, San Diego CCD District Office UNITID 122320) all match an admin-pattern name AND have total_fte_enrollment IS NULL — same structural signature as the named 9. Full enumeration in scripts/_verify_v13_amendment.py.

berea.reason: no name pattern match (Berea is a small teaching school whose name passes through cleanly)

fields.name: institution_name
fields.description: Used by the system-office filter (LOWER(institution_name) LIKE-pattern matching).

fields.name: instruction_expenses
fields.description: Used by the system-office filter (instruction_expenses IS NULL OR < $1M is one of 4 numeric-proxy disjuncts).

fields.name: total_fte_enrollment
fields.description: Used by the system-office filter v1.3 extension (total_fte_enrollment IS NULL OR < 50 is one of 4 numeric-proxy disjuncts; this disjunct catches admin entities whose instruction sits above $1M but who report no students).

fields.name: source_load_date
fields.description: v1.4 NEW INPUT (restored at consumable per §2 Decision G) — provenance metadata documenting when bronze was loaded.

fields.name: endowment_value_flag
fields.description: v1.4 NEW INPUT — IPEDS imputation flag passed through from bronze. Renamed to endowment_value_provenance at consumable.

fields.name: endowment_value_provenance
fields.description: v1.4 NEW — Iceberg field id 16. Renamed passthrough from base.endowment_value_flag per §2 Decision A. NULL on F3 (structural). On F1A/F2 the FY2023 domain is {R, A, P, Z, N}. Authoritative semantics: R = Reported by institution; A = Not applicable (institution has no endowment fund); N = Imputed using Nearest Neighbor procedure; P = Imputed using prior year's data; Z = Imputed using a zero value. Longitudinal-analysis guidance: filter to endowment_value_provenance = 'R' to limit to institution-reported values. CDE flag set per §6 data contract delta. CON-IFP-013 (P0) enforces 0 mismatches against base.endowment_value_flag.

fields.name: source_load_date
fields.description: v1.4 NEW — Iceberg field id 17. Restored passthrough from base.source_load_date per §2 Decision G. NOT NULL. Documents when the bronze source was loaded — distinct from fiscal_year (the IPEDS reporting cycle) and from promoted_at (the consumable promote timestamp). NCES revises previously-published vintages (preliminary → revised → final); source_load_date lets downstream consumers compare two cached snapshots and tell which is fresher. CON-IFP-015 (P0) enforces 100% non-null; CON-IFP-016 (P1) enforces within 400 days of promoted_at.

endowment_value_provenance.transformationDescription: v1.4 NEW column. Semantic-rename passthrough per §2 Decision A — base.endowment_value_flag is exposed at the consumable surface as endowment_value_provenance with NO value mutation. transform_row() reads base.endowment_value_flag and writes it to consumable.endowment_value_provenance at field id 16. The rename is for downstream-consumer clarity (the consumable surface uses 'provenance' to signal the longitudinal-vs-snapshot interpretation guidance documented in the data contract YAML and field docstring); the underlying value is byte-for-byte identical. NULL semantics propagate exactly: NULL on F3 (structural — passed through from bronze to base to consumable); {R, A, P, Z, N} on F1A/F2 with FY2023 observed subset {R, A, P, N} on F1A and {R, A, P} on F2. CDE-flagged at consumable (endowment_value_provenance changes how endowment_value and endowment_per_fte should be interpreted). CON-IFP-013 (P0) enforces 0 passthrough-fidelity mismatches against base.endowment_value_flag joined on UNITID. The old base column name endowment_value_flag is NOT emitted at consumable — only the renamed column exists.

source_load_date.transformationDescription: v1.4 RESTORED column per §2 Decision G — base.source_load_date is passed through verbatim to the consumable surface at field id 17 NOT NULL. Same value, same name, no transformation. Documents the bronze-load timestamp as observability metadata distinct from fiscal_year (the IPEDS reporting cycle, e.g., 2023) and promoted_at (the consumable-promote timestamp). The 'restored' framing reflects spec §2 Decision G — earlier consumable schemas exposed source_load_date but a previous spec dropped it; v1.4 reinstates the column based on @bs:data-steward feedback that downstream consumers need a way to compare two cached snapshots and tell which is fresher when NCES revises a vintage (preliminary → revised → final). NOT NULL is enforced by base's NOT NULL guarantee at field id 15. CON-IFP-015 (P0) enforces 100% non-null at consumable; CON-IFP-016 (P1) enforces source_load_date within 400 days of promoted_at to catch stale snapshots.

columnLineage.v13FieldsPreservedNote: Column lineage for the 13 v1.3-baseline consumable fields (record_id, unitid, institution_name, report_form, fiscal_year, total_fte_enrollment, the three raw-dollar passthroughs, the three per-FTE values, marketing_ratio, data_completeness_tier, promoted_at) is unchanged from v1.3. Only the two new fields' column lineage is enumerated above. Note: every v1.3 field's value flows through the system-office filter at transform_rows() — the filter excludes rows wholesale rather than nullifying individual columns, so column lineage is unchanged but row count changes (2,675 → 2,630, 45 excluded).

v14NewRules.name: Row count <= base row count (P0 upper bound)
Row count >= base row count - 50 (P1 lower bound)
fiscal_year present + single-valued at consumable surface
endowment_value_provenance passthrough fidelity (0 mismatches vs base.endowment_value_flag)
system-office filter executed: 0 rows match the §6 v1.3 4-clause exclusion predicate

dataQualityAssertions.v13RulesSplit: CON-IFP-001 (v1.3 strict-equality) was split per §2 Decision E into CON-IFP-001a (P0 upper bound) + CON-IFP-001b (P1 lower bound) to absorb cycle drift in the system-office filter (the 25-40 named entities can fluctuate by ±5 across cycles as IPEDS reclassifies). The original CON-IFP-001 strict-equality rule no longer applies post-v1.4 since base count and consumable count differ by design (45 rows excluded by the filter).
dataQualityAssertions.v13RulesPreserved: CON-IFP-002..010 all PASS unchanged on snapshot 950547093607535235.
